comment.body:
CTA Flows:
Over the next 1 week…
Flat tape: -$11bn to sell  (-$4.7bn SPX to sell)
Up tape: -$4bn to sell (-$1.3bn SPX to sell)
Down tape: -$40bn to sell (-$12.6bn SPX to sell)
Over the next 1 month…
Flat tape: -$27bn to sell (-$11bn SPX to sell)
Up tape: +$12.5bn to buy (-$142m SPX to sell)
Down tape: -$193bn to sell (-$58bn SPX to sell)
Translation: CTAs are selling in every scenario, with the worst case being $193 billion in global stocks if equity markets continue sliding in the coming month, and the selling will persist even if the market manage to rebound from here.

comment.body:
yo, real quick..listen up
we have no idea how lucky we are to be here.
i know for a fact that Alma is highly sought after in the industry.
X and every other platform is flooded with bullshit. even ignoring the obvious scammers, most of these so-called experts are just teaching nonsense, throwing around contradictory info, or pumping out fake analysis & trading ideas.
then you got those finance-snob discord groups, where people just wanna stroke their own egos, flex how smart they are, and then sell you some $1,000+ course that doesn’t actually teach you how to think..just regurgitates publicly available definitions.
but here we are, learning from Our Lady..the same person who proved last year she can see market trends before anyone else, even before the so-called most respected, most followed, most hyped names.
she teaches us, every damn day.
this morning, she casually showed someone how to pull data from IBKR.
she doesn’t just drop info..she teaches us how to think.
and all this for $35.
not 50, not 100, not 200.. but for fcking 35 bucks!!!
